input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.4.4
            TITLE: information about the electrical connections supporting the high current path must be

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.4.4: Information about the electrical connections supporting the high current path must be
EV.6.4.4 Information about the electrical connections supporting the high current path must be 
available at Electrical Technical Inspection

final_answer: Information about the electrical connections supporting the high current path must be available at Electrical Technical Inspection
